verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Satan is busy trying to block my path But I'm going all the way He's throwing rocks and hiding his hands But I'm going all the way You may stone me and turn your back on me But I'm going all the way Because God's got His arms wrapped all around me I'm going all the way

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: All the way, I'm going all the way No matter what tomorrow brings All the way, I'm going all the way So don't even try to turn me around Oh yes, I'm going all the way I've got to go all the way

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: God never said my way would be easy Or that the sun would always shine But He said no matter what I go through He will be with me all the time Because if God be for us Tell me who can be against us Greater is He that is in us than He that is in the world
